question: Show the name and the release year of the song by the youngest singer.
gold_sql: SELECT song_name ,  song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
gold_sql_original: SELECT song_name ,  song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT song_name ,  song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
agent_sql: SELECT Song_Name AS song_name, Song_release_year AS song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY Age ASC LIMIT 1
safe_sql: SELECT Song_Name AS song_name, Song_release_year AS song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY Age ASC LIMIT 1
agent_answer: The song by the youngest singer is "Love", released in 2016.
